mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_task_execution ( tenant_id, execution_id, conversation_id, agent_id, plan_json, status, total_steps, completed_steps, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{executionId}, #{conversationId}, #{agentId}, #{planJson}, #{status}, #{totalSteps}, #{completedSteps}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task_execution SET status = #{status}, completed_steps = #{completedSteps}, failed_step_id = #{failedStepId}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
UPDATE t_task_execution SET status = 'FAILED', failed_step_id = #{failedStepId}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, execution_id, conversation_id, agent_id, plan_json, status, total_steps, completed_steps, failed_step_id, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM t_task_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, execution_id, conversation_id, agent_id, plan_json, status, total_steps, completed_steps, failed_step_id, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM t_task_execution WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, execution_id, conversation_id, agent_id, plan_json, status, total_steps, completed_steps, failed_step_id, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM t_task_execution WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task_execution WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, execution_id, conversation_id, agent_id, plan_json, status, total_steps, completed_steps, failed_step_id, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM t_task_execution WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY created_at DESC
